name: Annie Mae's Lemony Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and allow to stand until softened.
2. Combine egg yolks, sugar, milk, and salt in the top half of a double boiler. Cook over simmering water, stirring frequently, until the custard thickens and coats the spoon.
3. Add lemon rind, lemon juice, and cottage cheese to an electric blender. Blend until smooth. Combine with cooled custard and blend well.
4. Chill until the mixture begins to thicken.
5. Beat egg whites and cream separately until stiff. Fold into the cottage cheese mixture.
6. Pour into 2 Graham Cracker Crusts and chill until firm.
7. Spread lemon topping on top before serving.
GRAHAM CRACKER CRUSTS
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Press evenly across the bottom and sides of 2 8-9 inch pie pans.
3. Bake for 5-10 minutes. Chill well before filling.
LEMON TOPPING FOR CHEESE CAKE
1. Combine egg yolks, sugar, butter rind, and lemon juice in the top half of a double boiler.
2. Cook over simmering water until quite thick, then cool slightly.
3. Mix cornstarch with water and stir into the lemon mixture.
4. Cool before spreading on cheese cakes.
